title: Strategies for solving trig equations
text: Consider different algebraic techniques used to solve equations, such as factoring or setting one side to zero.

title: Alternative strategies
text: Besides rewriting in terms of a single function, what other algebraic techniques can be used to solve equations?

title: When to use identities
text: Think about situations where rewriting in terms of a single function might introduce more complexity or where other methods are more direct.

title: Example of complexity
text: Consider an equation like $\sin(x)\cos(x) $$=$$ 0$. Would rewriting this in terms of a single function be the most efficient approach?
